text.title: Workflow Spec Phase Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers?

branch.question: Is a named human owner available for the Accepted gate?
Are requirements at least partially unclear (Brainstorm/Clarify needed)?

conclusion.verdict: apply the methodology; produce spec.md (Draft) and surface for owner review.
extract requirements from existing PRD; skip the full elicitation loop.
block; require a single named owner before any further work.
do not apply this methodology in this context; route to the correct one or skip.

text.example: Applies-If holds, Skip-If clear → named owner present → requirements partially unclear → run Brainstorm → Research → Clarify → Draft → emit spec.md (Draft) + owner-review flag.
